not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='posts'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='qotd_questions'

column.name: bio
column.value: Wife, mother, and believer. Finding peace in prayer and gratitude every day.

column.name: bio
column.value: Worship leader at Grace Community Church. Music is my love language with God.

column.name: bio
column.value: Seminary student. Passionate about scripture study and community prayer.

column.name: bio
column.value: Retired pastor. Still serving through prayer and encouragement.

column.name: bio
column.value: Teacher and prayer warrior. Lifting up students and families daily.

column.name: bio
column.value: New to faith. Finding my way one prayer at a time.

column.name: bio
column.value: Nurse and mother of three. God sustains me through every shift.

column.name: bio
column.value: College student navigating faith and life. Grateful for this community.

column.name: bio
column.value: Grandmother of five. Every day is a blessing.

column.name: content
column.value: For me, it has been spending just 10 minutes every morning before I check my phone. Even on busy days, that quiet time sets the tone for everything else. It does not have to be long — just consistent.

column.name: content
column.value: After 30 years of ministry, I can honestly say the thing that has helped me the most is journaling my prayers. When I look back at old journals, I see how faithful God has been even when I could not see it in the moment.

column.name: content
column.value: Listening to worship music during my commute has been a game changer. It turns a stressful drive into a time of praise and prayer. Highly recommend it!

column.name: content
column.value: Struggling with anxiety that won't let go. Please pray for peace in my mind.

column.name: content
column.value: Going through depression and finding it hard to get out of bed. Prayers for strength and hope.

column.name: content
column.value: Burnout from work and life is overwhelming. Please pray for rest and clarity.

column.name: content
column.value: Please pray for my mother who was just diagnosed with cancer. She starts chemo next week and we are all scared but trusting in God. She has been the rock of our family for 40 years and I cannot imagine life without her strength and love. We need a miracle.

column.name: content
column.value: Our church is going through a difficult transition with our lead pastor retiring. Please pray for unity, wisdom for the elders, and that God would send the right person to shepherd our congregation.

column.name: content
column.value: I am struggling with addiction and feel so alone. I know God can help me but I keep falling. Please pray that I find the strength to reach out for help and that God would surround me with people who care.

column.name: content
column.value: Pray for my finals this week. Trusting God with the results.

column.name: content
column.value: Praise God! After two years of infertility, my daughter and her husband are expecting their first child! Thank you to everyone who prayed with us. God is faithful.

column.name: answered_text
column.value: We prayed for two years and God answered in His perfect timing. Baby is due in July. Our family is overjoyed and so grateful for this community.

column.name: content
column.value: One of my students lost their parent this week. Please pray for comfort and peace for the whole family. They need to know they are not alone.

column.name: content
column.value: Starting a new job Monday. Nervous but grateful.

column.name: content
column.value: My husband lost his job last month and we are struggling to make ends meet. We have three young children and the bills are piling up. I am trying to trust God but the anxiety is overwhelming. Please pray for provision and for my husband to find work soon. We need doors to open.

column.name: content
column.value: Feeling disconnected from God lately. Please pray that I can find my way back. I used to feel His presence so strongly and now everything feels quiet.

column.name: content
column.value: Thank you, Lord, for another beautiful day with my grandchildren. Praying for all the grandparents out there raising little ones. You are not forgotten.

column.name: content
column.value: Pray for my marriage. We need God to intervene.

column.name: content
column.value: God answered! My son got accepted into his dream college with a full scholarship. We have been praying about this for over a year. God is so good!

column.name: answered_text
column.value: After months of waiting and praying, the acceptance letter came today. Full ride. We are in tears. Thank you to everyone who lifted us up.

column.name: content
column.value: Please lift up our worship team. We have a big Easter service coming up and we want every note to glorify God. Pray for unity and anointing.

column.name: content
column.value: Grateful for this community. You all lift me up.

column.name: content
column.value: My roommate is going through a really hard time and I do not know how to help. She is not a believer but she is open to prayer. Please pray that God opens her heart and that I can be the friend she needs right now without being pushy.

column.name: content
column.value: UPDATE: My husband got a job offer today! It is even better than his last position. God provided exactly when we needed it most. Thank you all for praying with us!

column.name: answered_text
column.value: Three weeks of uncertainty and God came through. Better pay, better hours, closer to home. He truly works all things for good.

column.name: content
column.value: Pray for the persecuted church around the world. So many believers are suffering for their faith. May God strengthen them and protect them.

column.name: content
column.value: Just got baptized last Sunday! Best decision of my life. Thank you to this community for helping me find my way to faith. I never thought I would be here but God had other plans.

column.name: content
column.value: Lifting your mother up in prayer right now. God is the great healer.

column.name: content
column.value: @Sarah Standing with you in prayer. Psalm 46:1 — God is our refuge and strength.

column.name: content
column.value: Lord, be with this family. Wrap them in Your peace. Amen.

column.name: content
column.value: Praying for complete healing. Keep trusting.

column.name: content
column.value: @Sarah As a nurse, I have seen miracles happen. Keep your faith strong. Praying for your mom.

column.name: content
column.value: My heart goes out to you, dear. Praying without ceasing.

column.name: content
column.value: God is bigger than any diagnosis. Believing with you.

column.name: content
column.value: Praying for strength for the whole family.

column.name: content
column.value: As a retired pastor, transitions are hard but God always provides. Praying for your elders.

column.name: content
column.value: @David Praying for your church family. God has someone perfect in mind.

column.name: content
column.value: Unity in the body of Christ is so important. Lifting this up.

column.name: content
column.value: You are not alone in this fight. God sees you and loves you exactly where you are. One step at a time.

column.name: content
column.value: Praying for freedom and healing. Reach out to someone you trust today.

column.name: content
column.value: Romans 8:38-39 — nothing can separate you from the love of God. Keep fighting.

column.name: content
column.value: You got this, Emily! Praying for peace and focus.

column.name: content
column.value: @Emily Praying for you sweetheart. Do your best and leave the rest to God.

column.name: content
column.value: Same here! Finals are stressful. We can do this.

column.name: content
column.value: This makes my heart so full! Congratulations to your daughter!

column.name: content
column.value: @James What beautiful news! God is so faithful. Praying for a healthy pregnancy.

column.name: content
column.value: Lord, comfort this child and their family. Be their strength.

column.name: content
column.value: @Rachel You are such a caring teacher. Praying for your student.

column.name: content
column.value: You will do great! Praying for confidence and favor.

column.name: content
column.value: New beginnings are exciting! God has great plans for you.

column.name: content
column.value: @Grace My family went through the same thing. God will provide. Philippians 4:19.

column.name: content
column.value: Praying for provision and peace. God has not forgotten you.

column.name: content
column.value: Spiritual dry seasons happen to everyone. Keep seeking Him. He is closer than you think.

column.name: content
column.value: @Daniel I have been there. Sometimes silence is where God does His deepest work. Praying for you.

column.name: content
column.value: What a beautiful heart you have, Maria. Blessings to you and your grandchildren!

column.name: content
column.value: Marriage is worth fighting for. Praying God restores what feels broken.

column.name: content
column.value: @Emily Just be present. Sometimes the best witness is a faithful friend.

column.name: content
column.value: Praying for open doors and open hearts.

column.name: content
column.value: God is so good! Rejoicing with you!

column.name: content
column.value: @Michael Welcome to the family! This is the best news!

column.name: content
column.value: The angels are celebrating with you! What a journey. Praise God.

column.name: content
column.value: Tears of joy reading this. God changes lives!

column.name: text
column.value: What Bible verse has meant the most to you this year?

column.name: hint
column.value: Think about a verse that spoke to you during a specific season.

column.name: text
column.value: How has your prayer life changed over the years?

column.name: text
column.value: What was the moment you first felt called to follow Jesus?

column.name: hint
column.value: It could be a big event or a quiet realization.

column.name: text
column.value: What spiritual practice has helped you grow the most this year?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you handle seasons of doubt in your faith?

column.name: hint
column.value: Doubt is part of the journey for many believers.

column.name: text
column.value: What is one thing you wish someone had told you early in your faith journey?

column.name: text
column.value: What hymn or worship song has shaped your faith the most?

column.name: hint
column.value: Think about a song that brings you back to a meaningful moment.

column.name: text
column.value: How has God surprised you in the last year?

column.name: text
column.value: What book of the Bible are you most drawn to right now, and why?

column.name: hint
column.value: Sometimes a particular book speaks to our current season.

column.name: text
column.value: What does "walking by faith, not by sight" look like in your everyday life?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you make time for God in a busy schedule?

column.name: hint
column.value: Share a routine or habit that helps you stay connected.

column.name: text
column.value: What is your favorite way to memorize Scripture?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you bring your faith into your workplace or school?

column.name: hint
column.value: Small actions can have a big impact.

column.name: text
column.value: What is one practical way you serve others in your daily routine?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you stay consistent with Bible reading when life gets hectic?

column.name: hint
column.value: What tools or plans have worked for you?

column.name: text
column.value: What does your morning quiet time look like?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you teach your children or younger family members about faith?

column.name: hint
column.value: Even small conversations can plant seeds.

column.name: text
column.value: What is one way you practice generosity in everyday life?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you choose which devotional or Bible plan to follow?

column.name: text
column.value: What is a simple habit that has deepened your relationship with God?

column.name: hint
column.value: Sometimes the smallest changes make the biggest difference.

column.name: text
column.value: When was the last time you felt God's presence clearly?

column.name: hint
column.value: Think about a moment this week where you felt peace.

column.name: text
column.value: What does forgiveness mean to you, and who have you needed to forgive?

column.name: text
column.value: How has a difficult season ultimately strengthened your faith?

column.name: hint
column.value: Looking back, what did God teach you through it?

column.name: text
column.value: What does it mean to you to "be still and know that I am God"?

column.name: text
column.value: What is a prayer you prayed that was answered differently than you expected?

column.name: hint
column.value: God's answer is sometimes better than what we asked for.

column.name: text
column.value: How do you experience God in nature or the world around you?

column.name: text
column.value: What part of the Gospel story resonates most deeply with you right now?

column.name: hint
column.value: Different seasons draw us to different parts of the story.

column.name: text
column.value: How has worship changed the way you see a problem you are facing?

column.name: text
column.value: What is a lesson you keep learning over and over in your walk with God?

column.name: text
column.value: If you could sit down with any person from the Bible, who would it be and why?

column.name: hint
column.value: What question would you ask them?

column.name: text
column.value: What is one thing God has taught you recently?

column.name: hint
column.value: It might be something small but meaningful.

column.name: text
column.value: What is a blessing you almost overlooked today?

column.name: text
column.value: How has God shown His faithfulness in your life this month?

column.name: hint
column.value: Sometimes faithfulness shows up in unexpected ways.

column.name: text
column.value: What is a promise from Scripture that you are holding onto right now?

column.name: text
column.value: What is one way God has provided for you when you least expected it?

column.name: hint
column.value: Sharing stories of provision encourages others.

column.name: text
column.value: What makes you grateful to be part of the body of Christ?

column.name: text
column.value: What is a kind word or encouragement someone shared with you that you still remember?

column.name: hint
column.value: Words of encouragement can last a lifetime.

column.name: text
column.value: How do you remind yourself of God's goodness on hard days?

column.name: text
column.value: What answered prayer are you most thankful for?

column.name: text
column.value: What does joy look like in your life right now?

column.name: hint
column.value: Joy does not always mean happiness — it can be a deep peace.

column.name: text
column.value: How has another believer encouraged you this week?

column.name: hint
column.value: Even a simple text or smile can make a difference.

column.name: text
column.value: What does Christian community mean to you?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you support a friend who is going through a tough season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Sometimes just showing up is enough.

column.name: text
column.value: What is the most meaningful way your church has served your community?

column.name: text
column.value: Who is someone you would like to pray for today, and why?

column.name: hint
column.value: Lifting others up in prayer is a gift.

column.name: text
column.value: How do you welcome newcomers into your faith community?

column.name: text
column.value: What is one thing you have learned from a fellow believer recently?

column.name: hint
column.value: We grow stronger when we learn from each other.

column.name: text
column.value: How do you stay connected with your church family during busy seasons?

column.name: text
column.value: What role does accountability play in your spiritual growth?

column.name: text
column.value: How has this online community helped you in your faith journey?

column.name: hint
column.value: Share how connecting with others here has impacted you.

column.name: text
column.value: What are you praying for this season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Seasons change, and so do our prayers.

column.name: text
column.value: What is a New Year resolution you made for your spiritual life?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you celebrate Easter in a way that deepens your faith?

column.name: hint
column.value: What traditions or practices are meaningful to you?

column.name: text
column.value: What does Advent or the Christmas season teach you about waiting on God?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you practice gratitude during the Thanksgiving season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Gratitude is a discipline, not just a holiday.

column.name: text
column.value: What is a Bible passage that feels especially relevant to the season you are in?

column.name: text
column.value: How do you find rest during the busy holiday season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Rest is not laziness — it is obedience.

column.name: text
column.value: What spiritual goal are you working toward this month?

column.name: text
column.value: How has the changing of the seasons reminded you of God's faithfulness?

column.name: hint
column.value: Creation itself declares His glory.

column.name: text
column.value: What is one thing you want to surrender to God before this year ends?

column.name: text
column.value: What are you most anticipating about the coming of Christ this Advent season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Advent is a season of waiting and hope.

column.name: text
column.value: How are you preparing your heart for Christmas this Advent?

column.name: text
column.value: What does the theme of hope mean to you during this Advent season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Hope is one of the four Advent themes: hope, peace, joy, and love.

column.name: text
column.value: What spiritual practice are you taking on or giving up this Lenten season?

column.name: hint
column.value: Lent is a season of self-examination and renewal.

column.name: text
column.value: How is God drawing you closer to Himself during this season of Lent?

column.name: text
column.value: What area of your life is God inviting you to surrender this Lent?

column.name: hint
column.value: Surrender is not defeat — it is trust.

column.name: text
column.value: How does the resurrection of Jesus give you hope in your daily life?

column.name: hint
column.value: Easter is not just a day — it is a season of celebration.

column.name: text
column.value: What area of your life feels like it needs resurrection right now?

column.name: text
column.value: How are you celebrating the new life that Easter represents?

column.name: hint
column.value: New life can show up in unexpected places.

column.name: text
column.value: What does the birth of Jesus mean for your life today?

column.name: hint
column.value: Christmas is the celebration of God entering our world.

column.name: text
column.value: How are you sharing the love of Christ with others this Christmas season?

column.name: text
column.value: What gift of God are you most grateful for this Christmas?

column.name: hint
column.value: The greatest gift is not under the tree.
